prompt: Two sorting robots coordinate on a conveyor. If a package is misaligned, SorterA stops the belt while SorterB repositions it. Once corrected, both return to normal operation. Belt must not stop for more than 10 seconds.
constraints: SorterA stops conveyor when misalignment detected
SorterB corrects package alignment before resuming
SorterA returns to normal operation once the package is corrected
SorterB returns to normal operation once the package is corrected
Conveyor must not stop for more than 10 seconds

  "query": "A[] (Conveyor.stopped imply clock <= 10)",

This uses A[] (universal always) to enforce that the safety property holds globally. The 'imply' operator ensures that at ANY moment the conveyor is stopped, the elapsed time (clock) must be <= 10 seconds. If this condition is violated, the property fails, preventing the conveyor from stopping for longer than the allowed duration.",
  "confidence": 0.92,
  "pattern_used": "time_bounded_constraint",

uppaal_result.explanation: The constraint requires that whenever the conveyor is in a stopped state, it must not remain stopped for more than 10 seconds. This uses A[] (universal always) to enforce that the safety property holds globally. The 'imply' operator ensures that at ANY moment the conveyor is stopped, the elapsed time (clock) must be <= 10 seconds. If this condition is violated, the property fails, preventing the conveyor from stopping for longer than the allowed duration.
